home.heroDesc: The best messenger of all time. Chat with friends, give gifts, and share photos, videos, and voice messages.

register.title: Registration —
register.desc: Registration is very simple. Enter your phone number and wait for the code to be sent. Then simply enter it.

information.title: Information —
information.desc: Your first and last name are required for your account. To be recognized, you must complete these two fields.

auth.title: Authorization —
auth.desc: Authorization is very simple. Enter your phone number and wait for the code to be sent. Then simply enter it.
auth.agreeWith: By signing in, you agree to

password.title: Password —
password.desc: A cloud password is one way to protect your account. Please enter your cloud password to authorize.

profileComplete.title: Complete your profile.
profileComplete.desc: Filling out your profile is one of the basic functions of our messenger. If you'd like to share information about yourself, this section is for you.

notFound.title: Oops
notFound.desc: It looks like the page you're looking for has gotten lost in the vastness of the internet. Try returning to the home page or using the navigation menu to find the information you need.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.reviewd1: Fluent is a messaging app designed for communication between users. It provides tools for exchanging messages, files, and other content, as well as for interaction between people within the service.
termsOfUse.reviewd2: This Terms of Use (hereinafter referred to as the “Agreement”) governs your access to and use of the Fluent messenger, including the website, app, features, services, technologies, and software provided within Fluent (hereinafter referred to as the “Service”).
termsOfUse.reviewd3: By using Fluent, you agree to the terms set by the developers of the Fluent messenger. If you do not agree with this Agreement, you must stop using the Service and not access it.
termsOfUse.reviewd4: We do not charge you for using Fluent unless explicitly stated otherwise. Currently, Fluent is free and ad-free. We do not display advertisements or use user data for advertising or marketing purposes.
termsOfUse.reviewd5: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, including any information that could identify you, such as your name, email address, or other contact details, except as required by law or with your explicit consent. User data is used solely to operate and secure the Fluent messenger.
termsOfUse.reviewd6: By using Fluent, you agree that your data may be processed to the minimal extent necessary to provide the service's functionality and maintain its stable operation.
termsOfUse.uslugid1: Your experience with Fluent is unique. We use data about your settings and preferences to personalize your interaction with the service.
termsOfUse.uslugit2: Connecting with People and Organizations That Matter
termsOfUse.uslugid2: Fluent helps you find people and groups important to you and connect with them within the service.
termsOfUse.uslugid3: You can share updates, photos, videos, send messages, make voice and video calls, create groups and events, and use new ways of interacting and sharing content.
termsOfUse.uslugit4: Discovering Content, Products, and Services That Interest You
termsOfUse.uslugid4: Fluent allows you to discover interesting content, offers, and services from other users and organizations.
termsOfUse.uslugit5: Ensuring Safety, Security, and Service Integrity
termsOfUse.uslugid5: We protect users and the service from abuse, block violations, and ensure stable operation.
termsOfUse.uslugid6: We apply modern technologies, including artificial intelligence and machine learning, to make the service safe and functional for everyone.
termsOfUse.uslugit7: Exploring Ways to Improve the Service
termsOfUse.uslugid7: We analyze service usage and test new features to improve the experience.
termsOfUse.uslugid8: Fluent integrates communication and interaction features to provide a consistent experience for all users.
termsOfUse.uslugid9: To operate the service, data must be transmitted, stored, and distributed across servers worldwide so that all users can safely and reliably use Fluent.
termsOfUse.financed1: You do not pay to use Fluent or other services we provide. However, by using Fluent, you agree that we may show you personalized ads or other commercial content sponsored by companies and organizations. We use data about your activity and interests to display relevant personalized ads.
termsOfUse.financed2: Protecting your privacy is crucial to our personalized ad system. Advertisers will not know who you are. We do not sell your personal data. Advertisers can provide information about their target audience and advertising goals (e.g., people of a certain age or with specific interests). We display ads to users who may find them relevant.
termsOfUse.financed3: We also provide advertisers with reports on ad performance, showing how people interact with their content. For example, advertisers can see aggregate demographic data and interests (e.g., an ad was viewed by women aged 25–34 interested in software development). We never share personally identifiable information without your explicit consent.
termsOfUse.financed4: We collect and use your data only to provide the described services. In the service settings, you can control what types of ads you see, from which advertisers, and what information we can use to select ads for you.
termsOfUse.obyazanosti: Your Obligations to Fluent and Our Community
termsOfUse.obyazanostid1: We provide you and other users with these services to fulfill our mission. In return, we ask you to follow certain obligations.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid2: To keep our community safe and responsible, you must use your real-life name, provide accurate information, create only one account for personal use, and not share your password or account access without permission.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid3: You may not use Fluent if you are under 13, have been convicted of serious offenses, or if your account was previously blocked for violating service rules.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid4: You agree not to post content that violates service rules or laws, is discriminatory, fraudulent, or misleading, does not belong to you or you do not have rights to, or infringes on others’ rights, including copyright or trademark rights.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid5: You may not upload viruses or malicious code, spam, access the service with automated tools without permission, use proxies for illegal access, or sell/license data obtained from the service without authorization.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid6: We may remove content or restrict access if it violates rules, and temporarily block accounts. If this happens, we will notify you and explain how to request a review if possible.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid7: You retain intellectual property rights to your content but grant us a license to store, use, distribute, and create derivative works to provide and improve the service. You can delete content at any time; deletion may take up to 90 days to complete, including backups.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid8: You allow us to use your name, profile photo, and interaction info with ads and content to show to friends without compensation.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid9: If you download or use our software, you allow us to download and install updates.
termsOfUse.obyazanostid10: We retain all rights to content provided by Fluent. You may only use it within the scope of permissions, licenses, or written consent. Attempts to modify, decompile, create derivative works, or access source code without authorization are prohibited, except as allowed by law.
termsOfUse.dopd1: We continuously improve our services and develop new features so products better serve you and our community. We may periodically update the Terms of Use to reflect our services and methods, ensure safe use of products, and comply with applicable law. Changes will only be made if provisions become outdated or incomplete, or are necessary for safety, protection, or legal compliance.
termsOfUse.dopd2: We will notify you at least 30 days before changes take effect so you can review them, unless required by law. If you continue using products after an update, you agree to the new terms. If you disagree, you can delete your account, and access will be closed.
termsOfUse.dopd3: We want users to feel safe and freely express themselves. If we determine you are clearly, seriously, or repeatedly violating rules, we may suspend or permanently terminate your access and delete or disable your account. Accounts may also be disabled if unverified, unused, or accessed without permission. We will notify you and explain how to request a review if possible.
termsOfUse.dopd4: Products are provided 'as is'; we make no guarantees regarding safety, error-free operation, or uptime. We do not control others’ actions or content and are not responsible for offensive, illegal, or objectionable content. Our liability is limited to the fullest extent permitted by law.
termsOfUse.dopd5: Disputes are governed by the laws of your country if you are a consumer, or by California law and courts of San Mateo and the Northern District of California otherwise. Meta may transfer complaints or disputes to a competent court in your country.
termsOfUse.dopd6: Some products are governed by additional terms, which become part of this agreement. If any part is invalid, it is minimally adjusted or separated, and the rest remains in force. Failure to enforce any term is not a waiver.
termsOfUse.dopd7: You may not transfer rights or obligations under this agreement without our consent. You may appoint an account legacy contact to manage limited access after a memorialization.
termsOfUse.dopd8: This agreement does not grant rights to third-party beneficiaries. We may assign rights and obligations during mergers, acquisitions, asset sales, or by law. We may also change account usernames in certain cases.
termsOfUse.dopd9: Your feedback and suggestions about products and services may be used by us without limitation or obligation to compensate, and we are not required to keep them confidential.
termsOfUse.contactst1: If you have questions, suggestions, or complaints about products and services, you can contact us by email. We strive to respond promptly and help users resolve issues.
termsOfUse.contactst2: For general support and questions about using Fluent products, email: support@fluent.com
termsOfUse.contactst3: For security, rule violations, or privacy concerns, use: privacy@fluent.com
termsOfUse.contactst4: For legal questions or official correspondence regarding the agreement, send to: legal@fluent.com
termsOfUse.contactst5: We recommend including as much information as possible about your issue or question, including account links, situation descriptions, and screenshots if necessary. This helps us process your request faster and provide accurate answers.

sessionSettings.title: Active Sessions
sessionSettings.noActiveSession: There are no active sessions right now.

privacyAndSecurity.title: Privacy and Security
privacyAndSecurity.blockListEmpty: You haven't blocked any users yet.
privacyAndSecurity.createCloudPasswordSubtext: You can use letters (a–z), numbers (0–9), and other symbols. The cloud password must be at least 6 characters long.
privacyAndSecurity.linkEmailSubtext: Once you link an email address, you won’t be able to remove it — only change it. Please use a valid email address.

privacyWhoCanSee.phoneVisible: Who can see my phone number?
privacyWhoCanSee.avatarsVisible: Who can see my profile photos?

editProfileSettings.title: Edit Profile
editProfileSettings.usernameSubtext: If you set a username, people will be able to find and contact you without needing your phone number.
editProfileSettings.usernameSubtextTwo: You can use letters (a–z), numbers (0–9), and underscores. The username must be at least 5 characters long.
editProfileSettings.bioSubtext: Any details such as age, occupation, or city. Example: 23 y.o. designer from San Francisco
